title: Software Engineer
long: Builds backend and frontend systems, collaborates with product and QA, writes tests.

title: Frontend Developer
long: Works with HTML/CSS/JS frameworks to implement UI and UX designs.

title: Backend Developer
long: Designs databases, APIs, and server logic; optimizes for scale.

title: DevOps Engineer
long: Builds CI/CD, monitors systems, writes infra as code.

title: Data Analyst
long: Gathers data, performs analysis, builds dashboards and insights.

title: Data Scientist
long: Works on ML models, feature engineering, and data pipelines.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
long: Deploys and monitors ML models, optimizes inference, scales pipelines.

title: Product Manager
long: Works with engineering, design and stakeholders to deliver product outcomes.

title: Project Manager
long: Manages timelines, coordinates teams, mitigates risks.

title: Product Designer
long: Creates prototypes, user research, and interface design.

title: UX Designer
long: Conducts user research and creates interaction designs.

title: UI Designer
long: Builds visual languages and assets for products.

title: Graphic Designer
short: Creates graphics for marketing and product.
long: Designs banners, posters, and brand assets.

title: QA Engineer
long: Writes tests, runs manual and automated test suites.

title: Systems Analyst
long: Bridges business and technical teams to define system specs.

title: Database Administrator
long: Ensures backups, scaling, and query performance.

title: Security Engineer
long: Performs security audits, threat modeling, and incident response.

title: Cloud Engineer
long: Implements cloud architecture, optimizes costs, automates infra.

title: Business Analyst
long: Works with stakeholders to define and measure business requirements.

title: Financial Analyst
long: Builds financial models and forecasts to guide decisions.

title: Marketing Manager
long: Coordinates campaigns, growth experiments, and messaging.

title: Content Writer
short: Creates written content for products and marketing.
long: Writes articles, copy, and documentation.

title: Technical Writer
long: Documents APIs, user guides, and onboarding materials.

title: HR Manager
long: Handles recruiting, policies, and employee relations.

title: UX Researcher
long: Runs studies and usability tests to inform product decisions.

title: Mobile Developer
long: Develops mobile apps, optimizes UX and performance.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
long: Programs microcontrollers, works on firmware and real-time systems.

title: Research Scientist
long: Publishes papers, builds prototypes, and explores novel methods.

title: Clinical Research Coordinator
long: Manages trials, participants, and data collection.

title: Nurse
long: Assists doctors, administers medication, and monitors patient vitals.

title: Medical Researcher
long: Designs experiments, analyses data, and publishes findings.

title: Public Health Officer
long: Works on population health, policy and prevention strategies.

title: School Teacher
long: Plans lessons, assesses students, and supports development.

title: Corporate Trainer
long: Designs workshops and delivers professional training programs.

title: Instructional Designer

title: Chef
long: Manages kitchen, creates dishes, and ensures food quality.

title: Baker
short: Makes bread, pastries and baked goods.
long: Works with dough, recipes and ovens.

title: HR Generalist
long: Supports recruiting, onboarding and HR admin.

title: Operations Manager
long: Optimizes processes, manages teams and ensures delivery.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
long: Optimizes inventory, shipping, and supplier relationships.

title: Civil Engineer
long: Works on roads, bridges, and buildings with engineering plans.

title: Structural Engineer
short: Ensures structures are safe and efficient.
long: Does calculations and design for load-bearing systems.

title: Mechanical Engineer
long: Works on machines, thermal systems and manufacturing designs.

title: Electrical Engineer
long: Works on circuits, power systems and control systems.

title: Environmental Scientist
long: Performs field studies, collects samples and analyzes data for environmental projects.

title: Biotech Engineer
short: Works on biotech products and processes.
long: Applies engineering to biological systems in labs and production.

title: Pharmacist

long: Works in pharmacies or hospitals ensuring medication safety and counseling patients.

title: Radiologist
long: Reads X-rays, CTs and MRIs and advises on diagnosis.

title: Physician
long: Works in hospitals or clinics providing medical care across specialties.

title: Clinical Lab Technician
long: Prepares samples, runs lab equipment and records results.

title: Legal Assistant
short: Supports legal professionals with research and documents.

title: Paralegal
long: Conducts research, organizes evidence and drafts legal documents.

title: UX Writer
long: Creates clear, concise copy for interfaces and helps shape tone.

title: Social Media Manager
long: Plans content calendars, analyzes engagement and grows community.

title: SEO Specialist
long: Works on keywords, technical SEO and content strategy to increase organic reach.

title: Sales Executive
short: Sells products and services to customers.

title: Account Manager

title: Customer Success Manager
short: Helps customers achieve value from a product.

title: QA Automation Engineer
long: Automates regression suites and integrates tests into CI/CD.

title: Research Analyst
long: Collects data, summarizes findings and presents recommendations.

title: Data Engineer

long: Helps organisations reduce environmental impact and meet standards.

title: UX Research Consultant
